cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship Development
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alex and Ryan meet at a hotel bar, bond over travel preferences and elite status, define their relationship as pressure-free, deepen intimacy through shared experiences, and Alex agrees to be Ryan's date for his sister's wedding.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Alex meets Ryan and accepts his invitation to join him at the bar.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Alex commits to attending Ryan's sister's wedding as his romantic partner.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Family Secret and Relationship Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Alex avoids defining her relationship with Ryan when meeting his sister; Ryan discovers her family at her home, leading Alex to deny him and later clarify that their relationship was an escape from her real life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Alex and Ryan's relationship remains undefined in a family context.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Alex rejects Ryan to protect her marriage and severs their emotional ties.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ryan is left heartbroken, and it is unclear if he will contact Alex again under her conditional terms.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Aspiration and Disillusionment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Natalie starts by innovating the firing process to gain visibility, is assigned to lead firings, but after directly handling layoffs and a related suicide, she quits and interviews for a new job.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Innovator introducing virtual termination system with company-wide visibility.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Interviewing for a new job in San Francisco after quitting CTC.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether she will be hired and how her past experiences influence her future career.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Dynamic with Ryan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Natalie's relationship with Ryan shifts from professional challenges and moral disagreements to moments of respect and personal confrontation, ending with Ryan's concern after she quits.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ryan questioning her competence in a role-play.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ryan expressing concern and intent to call her after she quits.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The nature of their relationship and whether Ryan's avoidance of connection changes.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Personal and Ethical Toll
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Natalie struggles with applying ideals to firings, faces distress from a client's suicidal thoughts and her own breakup, confronts emotional issues, and ultimately quits.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Her psychological advice rejected during a firing.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Quitting CTC after emotional turmoil and ethical conflicts.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How she reconciles her professional role with personal ethics moving forward.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Crisis and Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ryan's travel-based termination job is threatened by a virtual firing system, leading him to confront management and later falter during a professional presentation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Job security and lifestyle jeopardized by company changes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Left the stage mid-speech, indicating professional instability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ryan's job future and adaptation to new methods.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Alex
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ryan meets Alex, bonds over shared interests, deepens their connection through vulnerability, but discovers her deception and is rejected.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mutual attraction and shared interests established.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotionally heartbroken and drives away rejected after discovering Alex's family life.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Alex's deception and Ryan's unreciprocated feelings.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identity Crisis and Philosophical Shift
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ryan's advocacy for detachment is challenged by personal encounters and milestones, prompting identity reflection and a decision at the airport.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Instructs attendees to embrace a detached lifestyle.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Steps toward a gate at the airport after making a mental decision.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The meaning of Ryan's decision and his future direction.
